name: Big Dreams
overview: The Halaby family works in trade. When the father decides to write all his property over to one of his sons, the two brothers clash, until the eldest brother falls ill, and his younger son is forced to give up his ambition to take care of their business.

trailers.title: Ahlam Kbeera | مسلسل أحلام كبيرة - الحلقة الأولى
